name: Dirt
recipeInstructions:
1. Crush the Oreos.
2. Layer the crushed Oreos, prepared pudding, and cool whip in a plastic flower pot in several layers, ending with crumbled Oreos on top.
3. Add the gummy worms if desired.
4. Finish with silk flowers for decoration.
5. Serve by dipping into the "center-piece" flower pot to surprise your guests.
